name: Light Pill #16 - The Shadow Weaver
description: The Shadow Weaver - A glowing capsule that reveals the substance of darkness and teaches how to shape what light cannot touch. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Black velvet that absorbs all light, with silver thread tracing shadow patterns
Needles made of solidified darkness that sew with shadow threads
Silent slippers that merge with any surface
Chamber of shifting shadows and impossible geometry
What you hide in shadow grows stronger. What you embrace in darkness becomes your power.
You must weave three shadows into being - one from your deepest fear, one from your secret desire, and one from the person you pretend to be. Then stitch them together to create what you truly are.
Must be taken in complete darkness

properties.ai_prompt: Mysterious fashion editorial of The Shadow Weaver in a chamber of shifting shadows and impossible geometry, wearing black velvet that absorbs light with silver thread tracing shadow patterns, using needles of solidified darkness to sew with shadow threads. Void Silk aura with Whispering Dark energy, silent slippers merging with surfaces, cinematic lighting that defines shapes through absence of light, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible shadow substance being woven into tangible forms.
